name: Murder Hornets Arrive
effect_text: Everyone loses 1 Sanity. Active player may move forward 1 if they spend 1 Money on ridiculous protective gear.

name: Emergency Press Conference
effect_text: Choose: lose 1 Sanity from confusion or lose 1 Freedom by complying immediately.

name: Supply Chain Side Quest
effect_text: Lose 1 Money or discard a Survival card to ignore this.

name: AI Takes Your Job
effect_text: Lose 1 Money. Then choose: gain 1 Influence by rebranding yourself or recover 1 Sanity by logging off.

name: Crypto Pumps Overnight
effect_text: Roll. On 1-3 lose 1 Money. On 4-6 gain 2 Money. Market rises by 1.

name: Another Historic Election
effect_text: Switch Red Cycle and Blue Cycle. Everyone gains 1 Influence and loses 1 Sanity.

name: War Rumour Trends
effect_text: Everyone rolls. Lowest roll moves back 2 spaces. Panic rises by 1.

name: Expert Panel Contradicts Last Panel
effect_text: Choose: lose 1 Sanity or raise Control by 1 and gain 1 Influence for sounding informed.

name: Inflation Has Entered The Chat
effect_text: Everyone loses 1 Money. Market rises by 1.

name: Celebrity Apology Video
effect_text: Active player chooses: gain 1 Influence by reacting publicly or recover 1 Sanity by ignoring it.

name: Platform Changes The Rules
effect_text: Everyone with Influence 5 or higher loses 1 Influence. Everyone else gains 1 Influence.

name: Lockdown Nostalgia Spiral
effect_text: Lose 1 Sanity or lose 1 Freedom. Panic and Control each rise by 1.

name: New App Owns Your Attention
effect_text: Gain 1 Influence and lose 1 Sanity. Panic rises by 1.

name: Market Recovery Narrative
effect_text: Choose: gain 1 Money now or lower Market by 1.

name: Drone Footage Goes Viral
effect_text: Gain 1 Influence. Then draw a Scandal card if your Influence is now 6 or higher.

name: Energy Prices Spike
effect_text: Lose 1 Money or lose 1 Freedom by staying home for a round.

name: Everything Is A Subscription
effect_text: Lose 1 Money. If you have no Survival cards, lose 1 extra Sanity.

name: The Algorithm Picks A Villain
effect_text: Choose any player with the highest Influence. That player loses 1 Influence and 1 Sanity.

name: Global Summit Photo Op
effect_text: Control rises by 1. Active player may gain 1 Influence by pretending to understand the agenda.

name: Good News Gets Buried
effect_text: Recover 1 Sanity, then Panic rises by 1 because nobody believes it.

name: You Found The Hidden Hand
effect_text: Move forward 2 spaces but lose 1 Sanity.

name: Do Your Own Research
effect_text: Draw 2 cards from any deck. Keep 1 and discard 1.

name: Algorithm Rabbit Hole
effect_text: Lose 1 Sanity and gain 1 Influence.

name: Secret Meeting In Davos
effect_text: Control rises by 2. If Control reaches 6, active player also loses 1 Freedom.

name: Flat Earth Shortcut
effect_text: Skip to the next year checkpoint. Lose 1 Influence because your map is terrible.

name: Red String Corkboard
effect_text: Choose: recover 1 Sanity by cleaning your room or gain 1 Influence by explaining the whole thing.

name: The Birds Seem Suspicious
effect_text: Panic rises by 1. Draw a Survival card.

name: Symbol On The Dollar
effect_text: Gain 1 Money and lose 1 Sanity.

name: Podcast At 2x Speed
effect_text: Gain 1 Influence. If Panic is 4 or higher, lose 1 Sanity.

name: The Timeline Glitches
effect_text: Swap places with the player directly ahead of you. If you are first, move back 1.

name: Anonymous Thread Appears
effect_text: Choose: gain 2 Influence and raise Panic by 1 or ignore it and recover 1 Sanity.

name: Ancient Tablet Update
effect_text: Recover 1 Sanity. Then choose one meter to lower by 1.

name: Black Helicopter Feeling
effect_text: Lose 1 Freedom or discard a Survival card.

name: Follow The Money
effect_text: Gain 1 Money. Market rises by 1.

name: Secret Door In The Feed
effect_text: Draw one Headline card and one Survival card. Resolve the Headline first.

name: Too Many Coincidences
effect_text: Lose 1 Sanity. If you are The Normie, ignore this loss.

name: Hidden Symbol Bingo
effect_text: Gain 1 Influence for each chaos meter currently at 4 or higher.

name: They Changed The Definition
effect_text: Control rises by 1. Choose: lose 1 Sanity or lose 1 Influence.

name: The Group Chat Knows
effect_text: All players may discard 1 card to recover 1 Sanity.

name: You Were Right Too Early
effect_text: Gain 2 Influence and lose 1 Money.

name: Canned Food Stash
effect_text: Hold. Ignore one Supply Chain or Market penalty.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
effect_text: Hold. Prevent up to 2 Sanity loss from one card.

name: Side Hustle
effect_text: Hold. Use on your turn to gain 2 Money.

name: Off Grid Weekend
effect_text: Hold. Use on your turn to recover 2 Sanity, then skip your next Influence gain.

name: Bug Out Bag
effect_text: Hold. Ignore one move-back effect.

name: Media Spin
effect_text: Hold. Prevent one Influence loss from a Scandal card.

name: Mutual Aid Network
effect_text: Hold. When any player loses Money, you may discard this so both of you gain 1 Money.

name: Deep Breathing App
effect_text: Hold. Use anytime to recover 1 Sanity and lower Panic by 1.

name: Encrypted Group Chat
effect_text: Hold. Prevent 1 Freedom loss or 1 Influence loss.

name: Reusable Water Bottle
effect_text: Hold. Use to ignore one Pandemic Panic space.

name: Local Farmer Friend
effect_text: Hold. Use when Market rises to gain 1 Money instead.

name: Offline Hobby
effect_text: Hold. Use on your turn to recover 1 Sanity and 1 Freedom.

name: Receipts Folder
effect_text: Hold. Cancel one Scandal card targeting you.

name: Emergency Fund
effect_text: Hold. Use to prevent up to 2 Money loss.

name: Old Phone With No Apps
effect_text: Hold. Use to ignore one social media or algorithm effect.

name: Community Garden
effect_text: Hold. Use to lower Market by 1 and recover 1 Sanity.

name: Backup Generator
effect_text: Hold. Use to prevent one Freedom loss from an Energy or Control effect.

name: Actual Book
effect_text: Hold. Use to recover 1 Sanity. If Panic is 5, recover 2 Sanity instead.

name: Helpful Neighbor
effect_text: Hold. Give another player 1 Money or 1 Sanity; you gain 1 Influence.

name: Digital Detox
effect_text: Hold. Use to recover 2 Sanity, but lose 1 Influence.

name: Leaked Emails
effect_text: Lose 1 Influence unless you discard Media Spin or Receipts Folder.

name: Offshore Rumour
effect_text: Lose 1 Money or draw a Conspiracy card.

name: Lobbyist Lunch Exposed
effect_text: Control rises by 1. Active player loses 1 Influence unless they pay 1 Money.

name: Influencer Hypocrisy Clip
effect_text: If you have Influence 5 or higher, lose 2 Influence. Otherwise lose 1 Sanity.

name: Mystery Laptop Appears
effect_text: Everyone draws 1 card from any deck. Nobody may explain why.

name: Old Post Resurfaces
effect_text: Lose 1 Influence or lose 1 Money on reputation repair.

name: Fact Check Frenzy
effect_text: Choose: lose 1 Influence or raise Control by 1 and recover 1 Sanity.

name: Group Chat Screenshot
effect_text: Lose 1 Sanity. If you have Influence 6 or higher, lose 1 Influence too.

name: Emergency Rebrand
effect_text: Pay 1 Money to gain 2 Influence or do nothing and lose 1 Influence.

name: Committee Hearing
effect_text: Lose 1 Freedom unless you have Influence 5 or higher.

name: Sponsor Panic
effect_text: Lose 1 Money for each Scandal card in your personal discard pile.

name: Anonymous Source
effect_text: Draw a Conspiracy card. Then lose 1 Influence unless Panic is 4 or higher.

name: Public Apology Tour
effect_text: Lose 1 Money and recover 1 Influence.

name: Blue Check Dogpile
effect_text: Lose 1 Sanity or discard a Survival card.

name: Consultant Class Arrives
effect_text: Lose 1 Money. Control rises by 1.

name: Receipts Are Receipting
effect_text: If you have Receipts Folder, gain 2 Influence. Otherwise lose 1 Influence.

name: Comment Section Trial
effect_text: All players vote thumbs up or down. If down wins, active player loses 1 Influence. If up wins, active player gains 1 Influence.

name: Institutional Memo Leak
effect_text: Control rises by 2. Everyone with Freedom 3 or lower loses 1 Sanity.

name: Podcast Clip Out Of Context
effect_text: Lose 1 Influence. Then gain 1 Influence if you can summarize your defense in 10 seconds.

name: Nobody Reads The Correction
effect_text: Recover 1 Influence, but Panic rises by 1 because the damage is already done.
